completed_tasks.name: Build assembly modules and pdf-parser.js orchestrator
Build index.html with file input, size guard, result display
Fix OPS constants (49→44, 50→45) and DrawOPS constructPath format
Add all-page text fallback when CTM correlation yields 0 items

remaining_tasks.name: Verify end-to-end parse on real sample PDF (checkpoint:human-verify)
Update ROADMAP and STATE to close Phase 1

blockers.description: User must test index.html in browser after fallback fix (commit ec5771f) and confirm Posts found > 0, Distances found > 0

human_actions_pending.action: Run `npx serve .` at project root, open browser at localhost, select sample PDF, verify Posts found > 0 AND Distances found > 0
human_actions_pending.context: Plan 01-03 Task 2 checkpoint:human-verify. Warning 'Layer-specific text extraction yielded no results; using all-page text fallback.' is EXPECTED — the fallback is the fix.

decisions.decision: pdf.js 5.x constructPath args are [renderOp_int, interleavedDrawOPS_Float32Array, bbox_Float32Array]
decisions.rationale: Discovered from actual error 'ops is not iterable' — plan docs had wrong format. Confirmed by reading makePathFromDrawOPS in node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.mjs

decisions.decision: OPS.showText=44, OPS.showSpacedText=45 in pdf.js 5.x (plan docs said 49/50)
decisions.rationale: Read from OPS enum in node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.mjs lines 283-284

decisions.decision: All-page text fallback replaces CTM correlation for text layer extraction
decisions.rationale: pdf.js getTextContent() positions use textState.ctm (includes page initial transform) while operator list walker starts from identity CTM — systematic offset breaks 1.0pt tolerance matching. Fallback uses getTextContent() directly, filters by pattern, relies on proximity matching already in post-assembler and distance-associator.

next_action: User tests browser (npx serve .) → confirms posts > 0 → type 'approved' → /gsd-execute-phase 01 resumes phase close-out
context_notes: Three fixes total: (1) 4f072de: OPS constants 49→44/50→45, DrawOPS constructPath args[1] interleaved format. (2) ec5771f: all-page text fallback in pdf-parser.js triggered when layer-specific extraction yields nothing. Root cause of 0 posts: CTM correlation mismatch between operator-list CTM (starts at identity) and getTextContent position transform (includes page initial transform). Fallback bypasses correlation entirely. After user approves, phase close-out updates ROADMAP.md and STATE.md.
